ddls:
CREATE TABLE "budget_data" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget data */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data is recorded */,
  "county_congressional_district" TEXT /* County or Congressional District where the data is recorded */,
  "veteran_population" INTEGER /* Number of veterans in the population */,
  "total_expenditure" TEXT /* Total expenditure for the year */,
  "compensation_pension" TEXT /* Expenditure on compensation and pension */,
  "construction" TEXT /* Expenditure on construction */,
  "education_vocational_rehab_employment" TEXT /* Expenditure on education and vocational rehabilitation/employment */,
  "loan_guaranty" TEXT /* Expenditure on loan guaranty */,
  "general_operating_expenses" TEXT /* Expenditure on general operating expenses */,
  "insurance_indemnities" TEXT /* Expenditure on insurance and indemnities */,
  "medical_care" TEXT /* Expenditure on medical care */,
  "unique_patients" INTEGER /* Number of unique patients served by medical care */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Date when the fiscal year starts */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* Date when the fiscal year ends */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue for the year */,
  "budget_variance" TEXT /* Variance between budgeted and actual expenditures */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the budget data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_data_county_congressional_district FOREIGN KEY ("county_congressional_district") REFERENCES counties_congressional_districts ("county_congressional_district_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the state is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "veteran_population_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the state's population that are veterans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties_congressional_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county or congressional district */,
  "county_congressional_district_name" TEXT /* Name of the county or congressional district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county or district */,
  "veteran_population_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of the population that are veterans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the expenditure category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expenditure category */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the expenditure is recurring */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_expenditures" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expenditure category */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount spent in the category */,
  "fiscal_year_start" TEXT /* Date when the fiscal year starts */,
  "fiscal_year_end" TEXT /* Date when the fiscal year ends */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_expenditures_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES expenditure_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_expenditures_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budget_data ("budget_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veteran_population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county or congressional district */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Number of veterans in the population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the veterans */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the veterans */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the veterans */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the veteran has a disability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_veteran_population_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES counties_congressional_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the patient data */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county or congressional district */,
  "patient_count" INTEGER /* Number of unique patients served */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the patients */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patients */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patients */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the patient has a disability */,
  "primary_care_provider" INTEGER /* ID of the primary care provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_patients_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES counties_congressional_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., local VA office, state director, national policymaker) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or unit the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the budget record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budget_data ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
